query:
ALTER TABLE `content_ideas`
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `seriesName` varchar(200),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `ideaTitle` text,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `description` text,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `topicType` varchar(50),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `sourceBank` varchar(200),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `sourceFile` varchar(500),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `sourceRef` text,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `approvalLevel` varchar(50),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `difficultyScore` int,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `easeLabel` varchar(30),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `executionSpeed` varchar(30),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `reusability` varchar(30),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `suggestedFormat` varchar(100),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `readinessStatus` varchar(30) DEFAULT 'New';

ALTER TABLE `optional_posts`
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `funnelStage` varchar(50),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `sourceBank` varchar(200),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `approvalLevel` varchar(50),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `difficultyScore` int,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `executionSpeed` varchar(30),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `whyEasy` text,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `whenToUse` text;

ALTER TABLE `videos`
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `videoId` varchar(30) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `videoType` varchar(50),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `existingOrNew` varchar(20),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `objective` text,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `sourceAsset` varchar(500),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `hook` text,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `visualStyle` text,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `weekLabel` varchar(30),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `publishedLink` text,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `script` text;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3Wmw2s9e6VwZQ1V.ed7cfaa6430e --database 5DQjKtUEL6F458wSzFzJar --execute 
ALTER TABLE `content_ideas`
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `seriesName` varchar(200),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `ideaTitle` text,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `description` text,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `topicType` varchar(50),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `sourceBank` varchar(200),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `sourceFile` varchar(500),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `sourceRef` text,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `approvalLevel` varchar(50),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `difficultyScore` int,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `easeLabel` varchar(30),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `executionSpeed` varchar(30),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `reusability` varchar(30),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `suggestedFormat` varchar(100),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `readinessStatus` varchar(30) DEFAULT 'New';

ALTER TABLE `optional_posts`
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `funnelStage` varchar(50),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `sourceBank` varchar(200),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `approvalLevel` varchar(50),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `difficultyScore` int,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `executionSpeed` varchar(30),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `whyEasy` text,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `whenToUse` text;

ALTER TABLE `videos`
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `videoId` varchar(30) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `videoType` varchar(50),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `existingOrNew` varchar(20),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `objective` text,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `sourceAsset` varchar(500),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `hook` text,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `visualStyle` text,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `weekLabel` varchar(30),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `publishedLink` text,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `script` text;
